feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Curse or a Revelation (Probably a Curse)
entry.summary:
Author: I_shouldnt_be_given_this_power

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,746Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: The King of Camelot, his Knights of the Round Table and Merlin have had peace and quiet for far too long after the defeat of Morgana and Mordred and everyone became friends n shit (cos I fucking said so). A quiet quest to a small village with problems of the magical kind goes awry when Arthur is cursed. By what, they don't know, but they'll do their best to protect him on their trek home.Essentialy, Arthur's a damsel in distress.(no one died, I know I'm weak, I can't handle it)

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: Marshmellow0v0

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,736Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 55

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

entry.title: Waterfall
entry.summary:
Author: FallingLeaf1298

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,151Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 7

Summary: They found it there, in the woods. It was able to change destiny and fate itself. The interwoven golden strands becoming a more complicated web from the moment that they found it.

entry.title: What We Were, What We Will Always Be
entry.summary:
Author: MakingMyOwnReality

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,661Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 391

Summary: Crimson flags and crimson blood, Arthur Pendragon had died on the shores of Avalon, in the arms of his other half.A millenia passes and Merlin walks the Earth, changed yes, but hope still clings with ragged talons to what is left of his heart. Then, he trips onto a girl named Harry Potter and suddenly, he can breathe again.Or, the story of how two soulmates gain a second chance at life and build Albion while defeating Dark Lords on their way to Ben & Jerry's.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: venez à moi (Come to me)
entry.summary:
Author: wallacepark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,309Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: “Is this… something you do with Arthur?” Merlin had asked, his words muffled as he tucked in a corner of the bed sheet.Leon flushed as he put on his chainmaille and cloak. “Sometimes, every now and then,” He paused. “You?”Merlin whipped his head to face him and stood up. “No! Goddess, no… We don’t–He doesn’t see me like that.” __ ORLeon and Arthur have had a sort of agreement since they were teenagers. Somehow along the way his manservant, Merlin, ended up in the middle of it.

entry.title: Through All of Time
entry.summary:
Author: Sorreli

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,439Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: “I believe it,” Arthur sighs, “I won’t ever get a break, will I? How is it I’ve managed to become the sole entertainment for two sorcerers? I mean, really.”  Merlin chuckles, “I think his magic just… recognizes you.”  Merlin can hear Arthur's breath stutter behind him. “Oh, that’s…”  “I know,” he agrees, turning in Arthur’s arms so he can finally see his face. In the moonlight Arthur appears quite taken, the sudden pull of emotion heavy in the blue of his eyes as he stares back at Merlin unblinking. “I keep thinking about what my mother said. How she thinks his magic is just acting out because he doesn’t know what it’s like to be afraid of showing it. How he feels safe. With you.”  Arthur’s jaw tightens and finally he does look away, something glistening in his eyes as he loosens his hold on Merlin’s waist.  “With you too,” he mumbles, blinking just a little too quickly, “...maybe we are doing something right.”    -   A series of one shots that take place in the rise of Albion where Merlin and Arthur raise a child together through the years.

entry.title: To Rewrite A King
entry.summary:
Author: insomnia_writer_ims

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,372Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: What would you do if you had a second chance to make everything right?The Universe decides to have mercy on him and give him a second chance. Merlin is determined to make sure everything goes right this time.(Ongoing ending re-write)All rights go to BBC Merlin, nothing is mine! They just lie rent free in my head.

entry.title: Those Ocean Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: redamantica

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,398Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 8

Summary: “You need a new partner.” It wasn’t a question. “Are you offering?” Arthur asked. Merlin stepped closer, close enough that Arthur could feel the warmth radiating off him despite the cooling evening air. He extended a hand, pale fingers waiting. “I’m saying,” Merlin said, his voice dropping to something intimate, something just for them, “that if you’re looking for someone to watch your back in the water, someone who won’t let the ocean take you…then I’m your man.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: somewhere beyond the sea (my lover stands on golden sands)
entry.summary:
Author: highfunctioningclotpole

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,920Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 17

Summary: Merlin has always felt out of place beneath the sea, and far too drawn to the golden-haired king who walks the shoreline. Desperate to be part of Arthur’s world, he makes a dangerous bargain with a sea witch. Arthur brings the mysterious, silent stranger into his castle, never expecting the quiet man from the beach to upend his heart. As their bond deepens, Merlin carries a secret heavy enough to drown them both. Because the sea that Arthur fears is the home Merlin left behind.

entry.title: Golden Sideburns and Side-eyes
entry.summary:
Author: wryterwolf

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,776Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 5

Summary: The one-off chapters that go with the Golden Hair/Golden Eyes Series. These are supplemental little one-shot stories that, while they go with the main work, would either mess with the flow of the main story or have tags or content that may make the main story unenjoyable to some readers These do contain references to the main story, but can be enjoyed on their own.

entry.title: Not Without You
entry.summary:
Author: Needsdean

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,712Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 29

Summary: It’s been three months since Arthur’s death.The kingdom tries to move on, but Merlin… he’s still stuck on the day he held Arthur in his arms, unable to accept that he’s lost him forever.His pain comes to an end when one day, unexpectedly, Arthur comes back from the waters of Avalon.Trying to solve the mystery of this sudden return, Arthur and Merlin keep protecting the kingdom from the dangers that still threaten it, like the Saxons, whose new leader is ready to conquer the throne on Morgana’s name. It seems like nothing has changed, but everything has: the secret that Merlin was so afraid to reveal to Arthur ends up bringing them even closer to each other. In a Camelot where magic is no longer banned, in a new world where he can be by Arthur’s side without hiding who he is, Merlin finds himself living a dream with the fear of waking up, happy for Arthur’s return but also terrified by the idea of losing him again.Now that secrets between them are over, Arthur finds out Merlin has done so much more than hide his magic: to protect him he's suffered, sacrificed everything, made difficult choices. He begins to know a side of Merlin that’s new to him, and yet, that somehow he’s always known… and loved.

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,927Chapters: 23/24Kudos: 210

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Pendragons' Time Travel
entry.summary:
Author: KiaLecterGraham

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,391Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Magic was restored to the Kingdom of Camelot, and Arthur Pendragon, now King of Camelot, is married to the man who has always been the love of his life: Merlin. Everything was going well until one thing led to another, and now Pendragon's four children travel back in time to their parents' past. The downside of being in the past? Having to hide their magic and seeing that their parents are still not together.

entry.title: The Paper King
entry.summary:
Author: HerMajestyofLichtenstein

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,715Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 159

Summary: As Camelot stands on the brink of a new reign, the future has never been more uncertain. After the death of Uther, Arthur is poised to take the throne. However, heavy is the head that wears the crown. With the Council’s ultimatum looming large, his own advisors quietly manoeuvre for power in the shadows. Merlin can no longer hide behind the anonymity of a servant. With his magic exposed, he is thrust into the heart of court politics and responsibility. Protecting Arthur is no longer his only duty, and his people need him more than ever. In a realm on the edge of change, can they find balance in their new roles, or will the weight of the crown and the cost of magic tear Camelot apart?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Gwaine/Merlin (Merlin)
  • Gwen/Morgana (Merlin)

entry.title: if you are justice, please do not lie
entry.summary:
Author: daseydaisy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,486Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: “Can I help you?” The man shoved past him, not even the slightest bit put off by the biosteel onesie in red and gold. He unlocked the purple door with a wave of his hand (that’s not right, Arthur’s brain insisted) and shoved it open. “Sorry, I just…” All the words he wanted to say died somewhere between his brain and his mouth. Everything felt wrong but his heart eased up for the first time since he woke up in the middle of what he assumed was a park with a head injury and no memories. He pulled in a deep breath, set his shoulders, and tried again. “I think I belong to you.” There was a tense moment where neither man breathed. Or Superhero Arthur gets amnesia and decides to crash on Merlin's couch while Merlin's doing his best to "save" the city.

entry.title: A home where you can cry
entry.summary:
Author: BlackCloak

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,804Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: None of it had been expected, yet it became an unbelievable reality. After a random afternoon, in the blink of an eye, Arthur took a step whose consequences he could not foresee. But for Merlin’s sake—and even for his own—it was all worth it.OrAbout the feeling of finding home, despite losing everything.
